title: Stringify
description: A small utility mod to easily export a list of items with a configurable delimiter
body:
Stringify is a small clientside utility mod that enables you to export items present in an Inventory to your clipboard.

While adding a bunch of modded blocks to a shader I found it rather tedious to manually get the internal names and then manually add that to the shader file. With this mod you can simply fill a chest with leaves for example, press the large **Stringify** button in the top left of your screen and instantly get a list of all the items in that inventory added to your clipboard.

I've also added two commands:
- setDelimiter: Which allows you to specify a custom delimiter between the items if you need something specific
- toggleDuplicates: Which enables duplicates to also be added to the clipboard as by default each item will only be added once
